message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam monochrome true

actor "Admin" as Admin
actor "Customer" as Customer
interface "Games Interface" as GamesInterface
interface "Games Input Interface" as GamesInputInterface
boundary "Games Controller" as GamesController
database "Database" as Database

Admin -> GamesInterface : CRUD games
GamesInterface -> GamesInputInterface : Input games info
GamesInputInterface -> GamesController : Send CRUD request to server
GamesController -> Database : Query request to DB
Database -->> GamesController : Response

alt [success case]
    GamesController -->> GamesInterface : CRUD successfully
else [fail case]
    GamesController -->> GamesInterface : CRUD fail
end

GamesInterface -> Admin : Show notification

Customer -> GamesInterface : View Game
GamesInterface -> GamesController : FETCH game from server
GamesController -> Database : Query games
Database -->> GamesController : Games data
GamesController -->> GamesInterface : Games data
GamesInterface -> Customer : Show all games

@enduml
```
